text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 8 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
My inner peace comes from knowing myself
My inner strength is my spirit within
As with nature's intent
L will go with the flow as a river will guide us to the open sea
Then I will follow the course of life inherited to me

Affinity with the world close to me
Fills me with joy bring me calm lets me be
Like a flower will glow
I will prosper and show and may karma wil shine beyond when life has gone
And seeds of love will be soon to glow for all eternity
 

Trivia

A choral arrangement of “Robes de Champs” from Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance’s score, which itself is based on “Ichigoichie” from 1997’s TV anime His and Her Circumstances, also scored by Shiro Sagisu and directed by Hideaki Anno.
It is presented as a medley with “prettiest star” and has several variations of its motif in the album, including “m&r: piano”. https://genius.com/Shiro-sagisu-karma-lyrics
